notes: Operational roadmap for Post-Entry duty-rate sources. Source status controls product trust wording: auto_updatable means a maintained script can refresh stored rates; official_link means an official source is identified but not machine-refreshed yet; benchmark means local pre-check math only.

sources.name: United States HTS / USITC
sources.current_scope: General HTS base duty for maintained HS prefixes. Additional duties such as Section 301 and AD/CVD remain separate benchmark/scope checks.
sources.next_action: Keep USITC sync running before releases and monitor changes in data/duty-rates.json.

sources.name: EU TARIC
sources.authority: European Commission Taxation and Customs Union
sources.current_scope: Candidate source for EU common customs duty. Member-state VAT remains country-specific.
sources.next_action: Probe TARIC source structure and map maintained EU HS prefixes before writing rates.

sources.name: Germany import VAT with EU TARIC duty
sources.authority: European Commission TARIC / German tax authority
sources.current_scope: Uses EU common customs duty benchmark plus Germany VAT benchmark.
sources.next_action: Reuse EU TARIC base-duty updater after EU prefix mapping is stable.

sources.name: Netherlands import VAT with EU TARIC duty
sources.authority: European Commission TARIC / Dutch tax authority
sources.current_scope: Uses EU common customs duty benchmark plus Netherlands VAT benchmark.
sources.next_action: Reuse EU TARIC base-duty updater after EU prefix mapping is stable.

sources.name: Singapore Customs duties and GST
sources.current_scope: Candidate source for Singapore duty/GST status. Many electronics are duty-free but GST/value treatment still matters.
sources.next_action: Probe Singapore Customs pages and keep GST benchmark explicit.

sources.name: Mexico tariff / VAT
sources.current_scope: Benchmark VAT plus TIGIE tariff-line review reminder.
sources.next_action: Research machine-readable TIGIE source before automatic updates.

sources.name: Japan Customs tariff
sources.current_scope: Benchmark duty plus consumption tax reminder.

sources.name: Korea Customs tariff / VAT
sources.next_action: Research UNI-PASS or public tariff data access.

sources.name: China import tariff / VAT
sources.authority: General Administration of Customs / Ministry of Finance
sources.current_scope: Local benchmark for electronics import duty and VAT.
sources.next_action: Map official China tariff lookup or maintained local tariff table.

sources.name: Vietnam Customs tariff / VAT
sources.current_scope: Benchmark VAT/duty status for electronics; preferential tariffs depend on origin and entry date.

sources.name: Malaysia Customs SST / duty
sources.next_action: Research tariff/SST list machine readability and exemptions.

sources.name: Taiwan Customs tariff / business tax
sources.current_scope: Benchmark business tax and tariff-line reminder.
sources.next_action: Research customs tariff lookup data export options.

sources.name: Russia / EAEU tariff and VAT
sources.current_scope: Benchmark EAEU duty/VAT plus sanctions and restricted-party scope warning.
sources.next_action: Keep sanctions scope flag separate from ordinary duty math.
